list.title: Projects
list.subtitle: Group related chats under one umbrella

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.body: Create a project to keep related chats, their workspace and knowledge together. Any backend, model or assistant can run inside it.

modal.workspaceHint: Optional. Chats in this project start here, and a .wayland/ knowledge folder is created so every chat shares the same context.

workspace.emptyTitle: No chats in this project yet
workspace.emptyBody: Start a chat with any backend, model or assistant. It will live under this project, and you can run as many as you like at once.

assign.title: Add to project
assign.empty: You don't have any projects yet. Create one below.

delete.title: Delete project?
delete.body: Delete "{{name}}"? Its chats are kept and simply removed from the project.

removeChat.title: Remove from project?
removeChat.body: The chat itself is kept; it is just detached from this project.

knowledge.title: Project knowledge
knowledge.subtitle: Shared with every chat in this project. Edits apply to new chats.
knowledge.saveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.
knowledge.summaryEmpty: Add some content first, then generate a summary.
knowledge.noModelHint: Connect a model with an API key to auto-generate summaries.

context.label: Instructions
context.placeholder: Background and instructions every chat in this project should know.
context.emptyHint: No instructions yet. Click to add shared context for every chat.

rules.label: Rules & conventions
rules.emptyHint: No rules yet. Click to add conventions every chat should follow.

decisions.label: Decisions
decisions.placeholder: Decisions made in this project, so chats don't relitigate them (optional).
decisions.emptyHint: No decisions logged yet. Click to record decisions for future chats.

reference.label: Reference files
reference.dropHint: Drop files here, or click to browse

knowledge.noWorkspaceBody: Set a workspace folder for this project to add shared instructions, rules and reference files.

toast.saveFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

settings.title: Project settings
settings.instructionsHint: Injected into every chat in this project.
settings.rulesHint: Hard constraints every chat must follow.
settings.needWorkspace: Set a workspace folder first to write instructions and rules.

reference.title: Reference files
reference.subtitle: Material the AI can draw on - specs, brand docs, data. Available to every chat in this project.
reference.dropHint: or click to browse · PDF, Markdown, CSV, images…

memory.title: Project memory
memory.subtitle: Decisions and lessons for this project. Shared with every chat so they don't get relitigated.
memory.emptyBody: Record decisions as you make them. They ride into every chat in this project so nothing gets relitigated.
memory.ijfwSubtitle: IJFW's own project memory, surfaced read-only. Add anything important as a decision above.

wizard.subtitle: Answer a couple of quick questions. I'll draft a best-practice document you can edit.

source.hint: A sentence or two, paste relevant text, or upload a file. The more I know, the better the draft.
source.placeholder: e.g. A product launch funnel for the masterclass - broker outreach, the P&L model, and the replay funnel.

constraints.q: What should every chat always keep in mind?
constraints.placeholder: Anything else? e.g. 'Never recompute the locked P&L.'

draft.noModel: Connect a model with an API key to draft with AI.

newWizard.basicsSub: Two quick steps to a project that's ready to work. Skip anytime.
newWizard.instructionsSub: Optional - draft them with AI now, or add them later.
newWizard.noModelBody: Connect a model later in Settings to draft instructions with AI. You can still write them by hand.
newWizard.instructionsPrompt: Most projects work better with a short instructions doc that every chat shares. Want help writing one?
newWizard.orSkipBelow: or skip below - you can add them anytime
newWizard.skip: Skip for now, just get going
